ingredients_text:
Hummus 60% [cooked chickpeas 53% (chickpeas, water), water, rapeseed oil, Tahini 10%, spirit vinegar, salt, spices, acidity regulator: citric acid],
falafel 40% [chickpeas 30%, Textured wheat protein (wheat protein, wheat flour), zucchini, boiled chickpeas 11% (chickpeas, water), onion, water, rapeseed oil, tomato paste (tomato puree (tomatoes, tomato juice, salt), water, sugar, pickled onion (onion, salt), pickled pepper (pepper, spirit vinegar, sugar, salt), spirit vinegar, starch, salt, spices), spirit vinegar, spices (including coriander leaves), pickled dried tomato (dried tomato, water, sugar, salt), paprika paste (red peppers, sugar, salt, spirit vinegar), spice extract (onion, pepper), garlic, psyllium fiber, wheat fiber, salt, raising agent: sodium bicarbonate].
